patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73. Active problems documented include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia/unspecified anemia, leg pain, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major planned procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key abnormal labs (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8 (H), Iron 41 (L), Iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L), Triglycerides 158 (H); lipid panel otherwise documented (LDL 62, HDL 54). Multiple care teams recorded including Hand HA, MD (PCP), Hershey CL, MD, and specialty consultants. Notable functional assessments document difficulty walking; responses for dressing/bathing and tobacco history differ across sources and are listed in conflicts.
